name: Huachinango En Tostado (Red Snapper with Tost
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the fish in one cup of water with the salt, laurel, thyme, marjoram, pepper, garlic, and vinegar for 15 minutes or until the fish can be flaked with a fork. Drain and shred.
2. Fry onion, tomatoes, and parsley in olive oil for five minutes.
3. Add the shredded fish and chopped olives to the pan and cook for a few more minutes.
4. Fry tortillas in fat until lightly toasted.
5. Spread a spoonful of the fish mixture on each tortilla, add a layer of shredded lettuce, and sprinkle with the hot shortening used for frying.
